name: claude-code-internals
description: Gives Claude source-level knowledge of its own architecture. 86 lessons covering every internal subsystem — hooks (all 27 event types), permissions (7-phase pipeline, 23 validators), boot sequence, agents, compaction (including marble-origami reversible collapse), MCP, memory, AskUserQuestion tool, and binary-verified new features through v2.1.116 (OIDC Federation enterprise auth with credentials-file profiles, CLAUDE_CODE_HTTP(S)_PROXY fallbacks with downstream npm/yarn/docker/Java propagation, /model slash command headless mode, dark-launched features gated by 4 new GB flags incl. tool-use isolation latches and parallel MCP connect, server-side Advisor Tool, PushNotification + KAIROS mobile push, Context Hint API server-driven micro-compaction, Fullscreen TUI with /focus /tui and DECSTBM scrolling regions, Proxy Auth Helper, System Prompt GB Override, /fewer-permission-prompts, canary channel, slow first-byte watchdog, async-agent stall watchdog, Remote Workflow Commands /autopilot /bugfix /dashboard /docs /investigate sunset in v2.1.113).
